images.depicts: bright blue glue bottle with drip
fluffy chick cradling blue glue bottle labeled 'GLU'
chick holding crayon, scribbling on paper, tongue out
chick standing beside a paper with abstract scribbles/marks
images.issue: scribble doesn't clearly read as a drawn 'paw' shape - minor, acceptable for a kid's crude drawing

images.depicts: chick looking wide-eyed at glue bottle tipping/pouring blue glue
large amorphous blue glue mass/blob with chick standing near puddle
images.issue: glue blob doesn't clearly read as smeared on a drawn 'claw' shape - abstract, minor

images.depicts: chick and snake face-to-face on a rope/branch, no glue visible, chick beak open, no stuck posture
images.issue: artNote calls for chick comically stuck by one foot in glue with BECAUSE printed and snake peeking in amused; actual image shows NO glue at all, just chick and snake facing off - completely wrong scene

images.depicts: chick blowing on blue glue puddle, cheeks puffed
potato half-sunk in blue glue mass, chick and snake nearby

missing_files: saw.png (cards, bingo, matching - key vocabulary word 'saw' used in book text and tracing)

line_map.line: Chew! Grew! Flew! Drew! A clue!
Saw! Paw! Claw! Draw! A hawk on the straw!
The new blue glue! Where is the glue? On the claw!
Chick has the new blue glue. Chick can draw!
Chick drew a paw. Chick saw the glue…
The glue is on the claw! Chick is stuck — because the glue is new!
What is in the glue?! POTATO! all stuck up!

generate.line: Saw! Paw! Claw! Draw! / Chick saw the glue…
generate.mj_prompt: a small hand saw with a wooden handle, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: completely wrong scene - shows Chick and Snake facing off on a rope, no glue, no stuck-foot posture, no BECAUSE moment depicted at all
wrong_art.fix: regenerate to match artNote: chick comically fixed to the spot with one foot glued down, tugging, Snake peeking in amused
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a tiny fluffy yellow chick comically fixed to the spot with one foot glued down in a blue glue puddle, straining and tugging to pull free, a friendly emerald-green snake peeking in from the side looking amused, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw
